defaultValue.value: FocusGuard is undergoing scheduled maintenance. We'll be back shortly!

blocked_usernames.description: Reserved usernames that cannot be registered

defaultValue.value: ["Your future self will thank you for this moment of focus.","Every minute of deep work compounds into extraordinary results.","The phone can wait. Your dreams cannot.","You're trading a dopamine hit for a dopamine mountain.","Scrolling steals time. Focus creates legacy.","This block isn't a restriction — it's a gift to yourself.","The world's most successful people guard their attention fiercely.","Right now, you're choosing growth over distraction.","One hour of focus > five hours of multitasking.","Your attention is the most valuable currency you own.","The apps will be there later. This moment won't.","Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.","You don't need notifications to know you matter.","Real connections happen face to face, not screen to screen.","Every time you resist, your willpower muscle grows stronger.","The average person checks their phone 96x daily. You're not average.","Three years from now, you'll wish you started focusing today.","Your brain isn't designed for constant stimulation. Give it peace.","When you feel the urge, breathe. It passes in 15 seconds.","You're rewiring your brain right now. Keep going."]

motivational_messages.description: Motivational messages shown when blocking apps (first 20 of 200)

defaultValue.value: {"slides":[{"title":"Take Back Your Time","subtitle":"FocusGuard helps you build a healthier relationship with technology","image":"onboarding_1"},{"title":"Block Distractions","subtitle":"Smart app blocking that adapts to your schedule","image":"onboarding_2"},{"title":"Track Progress","subtitle":"See your productivity score improve day by day","image":"onboarding_3"},{"title":"Join the Community","subtitle":"Compete in challenges and keep each other accountable","image":"onboarding_4"}]}
